title: T-052 — ROOT: NPD Dashboard page group (NpdDashboard prototype) (NPD-e)
prompt:
# T-052 — ROOT: NPD Dashboard page group

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §11.1, §11.5, §11.7 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md NpdDashboard
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:32-174 (NpdDashboard)

## Type
T0-root — workflow descriptor only. NOT executable. Defines the group of slice tasks that together translate the NPD Dashboard prototype regions into production and assemble them under the dashboard route.

## Scope (this descriptor)
This task describes the NPD Dashboard page group and points to atomic slice tasks. Do not implement any code under this task — implementation occurs in the slices listed below.

## Slice tasks under this root
- T-132: UI slice — Dashboard KPI counters region (fa-screens.jsx:32-174 top counters/stats region)
- T-133: UI slice — Dashboard Pipeline preview region (recent projects mini-view embedded in dashboard)
- T-134: WIRING — assemble dashboard regions into /(npd) page with data wiring and navigation
- T-135: PARITY — Playwright screenshot parity vs fa-screens.jsx:32-174 + axe checks

## Workflow contract
1. Slices T-132 and T-133 execute in parallel; each ships its own RTL tests + component files.
2. T-134 executes after T-132 + T-133 complete; assembles regions in the dashboard route page and wires data sources.
3. T-135 executes after T-134; runs Playwright parity vs the prototype and axe-violations check.

## Out of scope (root level)
- No production code lives at the root.
- Server Actions are handled in T-051.
- Full E2E test is handled in T-091.

## Acceptance (root)
- All listed slices closed.
- T-134 wiring task closed with all dashboard regions rendering, data loaded, and navigation links working.
- T-135 parity task closed with Playwright screenshot + axe artifacts attached.
